Let me start by opening that section to find the capital reserve value.</think>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>I found the capital reserve (资本公积) value in DOC3. The document is for 迈克生物股份有限公司 (Microbiological Co., Ltd.) and shows:

资本公积 | 1,780,989,744.69 | 1,780,989,744.69

This is the ending balance (期末余额) of 1,780,989,744.69 yuan.

Now I need to check if there are other companies in the other documents (DOC1 and DOC2) to compare. However, I'm only processing DOC3 right now. I should extract this evidence and stop, as I've found the relevant information for this document.

Let me extract the verbatim evidence that includes the company name and the capital reserve value.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found capital reserve value for this document"}</search>
<answer>["编制单位：迈克生物股份有限公司","资本公积|1,780,989,744.69|1,780,989,744.69"]</answer>
